response.justification: Bogdan brings solid full-stack engineering fundamentals and genuine high-scale distributed systems exposure (millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby), but the resume shows no evidence of the domain expertise central to this role: experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical/rollout-risk analysis. His current title is Senior Software Developer, well below the Principal/IC6 seniority level required, and there is no indication of cross-team technical leadership at the scope described. The breadth of languages partially aligns with requirements, but domain fit for growth and experimentation systems is essentially absent.
strengths: High-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests/second with low-latency constraints
Consistent track record with strong engineering practices — TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development — across multiple employers
Polyglot background covering C/C++, Java, TypeScript/Node.js, and D, satisfying the language breadth listed in requirements
concerns: No experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management experience anywhere in the resume
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or data/statistical analysis background; growth measurement systems are entirely absent
Seniority is Senior-level, not Principal/IC6; no evidence of owning multi-team technical strategy or large cross-functional initiatives
